name: Imitative Generator
descs:
[Effects apply only to #1, #2 Deployed Identities]

Activates when the unit has 10+ ([Charge] Count + 'Unique Charge') at Turn Start.

Coin Power +1 to Skill 3 that gains or consumes [Charge] Count or 'Unique Charge'.

If the said Skill has less than 5 Base Power, deal +25% damage; if it has 5+ Base Power, gain an additional Coin Power +1.
